title: Define Radio Group Properties (Character Mode)
text: Define Radio Group Properties (Character Mode) Define the properties for this radio group when it appears in character mode. For information on radio group widgets, see uradiogroup (RadioGroup) . Properties Number of Columns (Columns) Number of Rows ( rows) Frame Value and Representation How to Setting Widget Properties Related Links Widgets and Character Mode If you create components that are intended for use in a character mode environment, be economical with the amount of text you display in each label and widget.
